name: mpi4py On Slurm
summary: Run mpi4py Python programs on Slurm with matching MPI and Python environments.
description: This skill helps users run mpi4py workloads through Slurm while checking that the Python environment, MPI module, launcher, logs, and output paths are aligned on shared HPC systems.

inputs.name: python_script
inputs.description: mpi4py Python script to run across Slurm tasks.

inputs.name: mpi_module
inputs.description: Site MPI module that matches the mpi4py build or Python package.

inputs.name: python_environment
inputs.description: Optional virtualenv or Conda/Mamba environment containing mpi4py.

inputs.name: launcher
inputs.description: MPI launcher to use inside the Slurm allocation, usually srun or a site-recommended mpiexec.

outputs.name: slurm_log
outputs.description: Slurm stdout/stderr log for the mpi4py job.

outputs.name: mpi_environment_record
outputs.description: Python, mpi4py, MPI library, rank layout, and launcher evidence captured in the log.

outputs.name: rank_report
outputs.description: CSV and text outputs describing rank, size, host, and MPI version observations.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Check the Slurm wrapper shell syntax.
Replace account, partition, MPI module, and optional Python environment placeholders, then submit to a short test partition and confirm all ranks report the same MPI library and expected world size.
